name: compass-labs
description: Compass Labs DeFi tooling for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: compass
plugins.description: Drive the compass CLI to do on-chain DeFi via Compass Labs: Aave lending/borrowing, Morpho/ERC-4626 vault yield, swaps, perps, tokenized equities, and gas-sponsored transactions on Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Base. Installs and sets up the CLI, then maps plain-English intents to commands.
